title: tephrosia microcarpa
intro: Tephrosia microcarpa, also known as the small flower horsefly tree, is a plant species native to South Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia microcarpa include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural insect repellent. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia microcarpa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
